title: P0: Rework waiting-to-send queue UX and reliability
before: Queue showed truncated text with only Dismiss all; no inspect/edit/send-now per row.
after: Expanded queue rows expose View (full body + attachment lines), Edit, Send now, Retry, Remove; position pills; Clear queue label.
screenshot: not run: browser proof skipped; UI change covered by queue-storage tests and manual QueueStrip markup
